title: Chaotic Neutral - BTA
description: A Better Than Adventure mod for 7.2 that adds... things... chaotic, to the game... Yeah...
body:
A wacky mod made for **BTA 7.2** that adds wacky items, **is main purpose is to teach myself Java**... and also have fun with my friends, but I figured releasing to the public would be fun !

## FEATURES ! (cause without those... then it wouldn't even be worth it)
![Hold](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0dd4eae4dc7bbd34cd51749d09f6b746ed1597d5.png) As for what's featured...

The Mod includes **Plushies**. Can be very cute, or very terrifying...\
Crafted commonly with **3 different wools and a string**\
![Recipe Plushie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d304a73eb5472feeb6711f42f1052dbfad7bce05.gif)\
Which wool and which dye ? It's you to find. (or just look up the recipe book idk, i'm not your tutor)

You may want to craft as well a **Flintlock**. A very powerful alternative to the Hand Cannon.\
Crafted with **3 logs of any types, 2 Steel and Gold**\
![Recipe Flintlock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6317de37e0e7490ce5cfac5c52f64c24aff90fbe.gif)\
It requires as ammo **Iron Bullets**, but be cautious ! You can only stack them **by 4** !

And there's **much more!** that I don't wanna state or otherwise it's gonna take me another 2 hours to make gifs of the crafting recipes and it's already 3am here so i'm going to leave it at that.

Anyhoo hope you enjoy this silly mod ! ♥
